channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts

item.title: Litecoin stalls in a tight grind: bulls vs bears locked in a dead zone. No breakout signals yet. 🔒💥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260423-price-prediction-ltc-litecoin-trapped-in-47-62-range #Litecoin #CryptoNews #PricePrediction
